ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the document was last updated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who uploaded the document */,
  "doc_status" TEXT /* Current status of the document (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the document (e.g., coding standards, best practices, training materials) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the document is currently active and accessible */,
  "last_reviewed" TEXT /* Date of the last review of the document */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last reviewed the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chapters" (
  "chapter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chapter */,
  "chapter_number" INTEGER /* Number of the chapter */,
  "chapter_title" TEXT /* Title of the chapter */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document to which the chapter belongs */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the chapter is locked for editing */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the chapter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chapter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chapters_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "chapter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chapter this section belongs to */,
  "section_number" TEXT /* Number of the section within the chapter */,
  "section_title" TEXT /* Title of the section */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the section is locked for editing */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the section was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_chapter_id FOREIGN KEY ("chapter_id") REFERENCES chapters ("chapter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section this topic belongs to */,
  "topic_title" TEXT /* Title of the topic */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points associated with the topic */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the topic */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the topic is locked for editing */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the topic was last updated */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words in the topic content */,
  "content" TEXT /* Detailed content of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the author */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the author is currently active in the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the author's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, manager, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is currently active in the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the comment relates to */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment has been resolved */,
  "resolution_text" TEXT /* Text of the resolution for the comment */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the version record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the version was recorded */,
  "is_major_version" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the version is a major release */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update made */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "is_urgent" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the update is urgent */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the update (1-5, with 1 being the highest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_updates_update_by FOREIGN KEY ("update_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_updates_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)
